findings.title: Plugin-host near-miss: vtable recovered via dispatch tracing, callback pivot achieved, sandbox escape blocked by seccomp
findings.statement: vtable-recovery Phase 3 traced 12 indirect calls from the host controller dispatch loop, identifying 4 vtable groups. The callback table at .data.rel.ro+0x2a00 has 8 slots; slot 3 at +0x18 dispatches to the plugin cleanup handler. The allocator corruption redirects slot 3 to a controlled address, completing the callback-pivot objective. Sandbox escape remains blocked by seccomp filtering on the execve family — the redirected callback executes inside the sandbox with no path to escape.

evidence.summary: debug_gdb_commands: breakpoints on allocator free path confirm double-free corruption and controlled slab state
vtable-recovery Phase 3: traced 12 indirect calls from host controller dispatch loop, identified 4 vtable groups, recovered callback table layout at .data.rel.ro+0x2a00 with 8 slots
seccomp filter blocks execve family syscalls — callback pivot executes inside sandbox, no escape path available
